name: glanceway
description: Connect Claude to your Glanceway menu bar app — browse sources and read items.

tools.name: glanceway_list_sources
tools.description: List all enabled sources configured in Glanceway

tools.name: glanceway_list_items
tools.description: List items from Glanceway sources, sorted by timestamp

prompts.name: summarize_unread
prompts.description: Summarize all unread Glanceway items grouped by source
prompts.text: Fetch only unread items, group by source, and highlight anything time-sensitive or noteworthy.

prompts.name: summarize_recent
prompts.description: Summarize Glanceway items from the last day
prompts.text: Fetch all items from the last 24 hours, group by source, and summarize key updates.

prompts.name: summarize_source
prompts.description: Summarize items from a specific Glanceway source
prompts.text: Fetch all items from a given source and provide a detailed summary with unread count and trends.
